title: Goal Achieved: A Toast for the Unknown

text_block_list.text:
…On a certain day, as the flowers 
prepare to bloom for Spring.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff ——

text_block_list.name: $(scale 55)Elegant Chestnut-Haired Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your hard work today…! 
Your goals should all be complete 
with this…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Fuu… I think I've finally managed to take a small step forward.

Stay Gold has finally obtained the track 
record allowing her to compete in the 
Classics, and discovered what it means 
to have "Fast and Tenacious Legs".

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
……I am quite surprised that you were 
able make it this far before Spring.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hahah. I needed you to treat to me like the way you did, otherwise I wouldn't have been fit for the upcoming battle, neither for the Classics, nor for my future.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Thanks McQueen. It's only because you 
were here, that I was able to trudge 
onward and discover a new path.
choice_data_list: From my heart also, thank you very much
From my heart also, thank you very much

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…I only followed the training plan set 
by Trainer, and poured my heart into 
running with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The fact that you were able to progress 
towards your ideal form is completely 
thanks to the both of your efforts. On 
top of that ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The spring winds have not even graced 
us yet… The view you promised me, 
is that still not to come?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Keep looking forward to it for me.
choice_data_list: We'll have to keep honing your skills

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh, it seems like you've already got something prepared for me hey.
choice_data_list: You'll see once we head back on campus

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Nice. Surprises like this are always welcome.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
……You two happen to be quite 
similar from time to time.
Once we returned to the campus ——

To test the results of Stay Gold's training, 
I invited the perfect individuals to help us 
find out.
choice_data_list: I'm putting you against these two

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hahah…! I see now, so it's these guys.

text_block_list.name: Bubble Gum Fellow
text_block_list.text:
Hello Stego! Looking forward to our 
run together today.

The two I requested to be Stay Gold's 
running partners are Fuji Kiseki and 
Bubble Gum Fellow.

——Bubblegum Fellow was the first 
horse girl her age to win the Tenno 
Sho (Autumn) after it was shortened 
to 2000 meters.

With this great achievement, she has 
been given a top-class status. 
Additionally ——

You can say that Fuji Kiseki and Bubblegum 
Fellow both share similar characteristics in 
their running.

So by extension, Stay Gold's speed 
also matches their characteristics.

Whatever tenacity Stay Gold managed 
to gain through her special training… 
I believe these two are the perfect 
individuals to help her find out…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Even so, for the two of you to be here, this 
has become quite the extravagant affair.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Fufu, hearing you say that is a great 
honour to me. Nonetheless, we'd 
also like to reciprocate through our 
fiery passion.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer's enthusiasm was absolutely 
dazzling. Also ——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We're curious as to what your "Fast and 
Tenacious Legs" look like.

text_block_list.name: Bubble Gum Fellow
text_block_list.text:
…Fuji and myself were both unable to run 
in the Satsuki Sho due to our injuries.

text_block_list.name: Bubble Gum Fellow
text_block_list.text:
And because of these injuries, we 
weren't able to grasp what the 
limits of our speed looked like.

text_block_list.name: Bubble Gum Fellow
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want you to show me up 
close. If you can compete against 
our speed, and if you could gain 
something from it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…While our foundations are similar, 
compared to you guys, how I run is 
nowhere as sophisticated.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
So if it's alright with you, I want you to 
run as you please. In return, I'll be 
taking your running as sustenance for 
my journey.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
So we're mimicking the Satsuki Sho huh. 
Nice, this'll be interesting ——

Fuji Kiseki and Bubblegum Fellow smoothly 
accelerated in the final spurt, meanwhile 
as Stay Gold was hovering in the back ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get going…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ————Haaaaa!!!

Like an vagrant shooting star advancing 
through the sky, Stay Gold burst through with 
all her power saved up for the final spurt. Her 
sharpness, strength and danger… Unrivalled.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
……Fast and stubborn, I really got to see 
these two qualities hand in hand today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Stego's performance at the Satsuki Sho, 
I'm really looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your words. From myself 
also, I'd like to say that you've both 
granted me a great experience.

text_block_list.name: Bubble Gum Fellow
text_block_list.text:
You'd better stir up a storm in this year's 
Classics! I'll be watching you for that!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha, please look forward to it. I won't let today's encounter go to waste.

Like this, Stay Gold was able to fully 
absorb their running styles to her 
heart's content and ——
————That night.

……My heart was still throbbing from the 
adrenaline rush. Feeling the need to calm 
myself down, I wandered outside and ——

She was right there, as if my supposed 
aimless wandering turned out not so 
aimless after all.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Yo.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
The moon looks pretty good today, 
the sky is also quite clear.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…I had a lot of fun today, to think I'd 
even have the chance to race with 
Fuji and Bubble.
choice_data_list: I knew it'd be a great experience for you

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…You're right. I feel like I was only 
able to run with those two because 
I am on this journey. That's why ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
From now on always, please approach 
our journey in your own way.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Because I know, that our journey will 
be far more interesting that way.
choice_data_list: You can leave it to me
You can leave it to me

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha, nice. That's reassuring to hear.
choice_data_list: …I've got some canned coffee, want one?
…I've got some canned coffee, want one?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh～ How thoughtful hey. I'll have one then.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Alright. Should we have ourselves 
a toast?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: For the path that just opened up for us.

…The sound of coffee cans clanking 
rung under the moon.

Indeed, we both couldn't hide our 
expressions to the exhilaration for 
our journey towards the unknown…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …………This is gonna be great.

The unpredictable Satsuki Sho 
will soon be upon us.
